transcript: Speaker A: Do you also want to speak confidently but don't have a speaking partner? Because honestly, that is the biggest problem for most learners. That's exactly why I'm loving SpeakX. So, this is an AI-powered English speaking app where you get your personalized AI teacher, Sia. You can practice AI-driven conversations anytime and anywhere without being judged. This app follows a structured learning path so you always know what to practice next. And learning doesn't feel boring because it's gamified, fun, interactive, and motivating. So, you can try this app with a 7-day trial which costs only ₹29. And you can experience everything before committing. SpeakX has already received recognition from industry leaders and organizations, and there are so many success stories of learners improving their English every single day. So, if you want to speak English without fear and you want a speaking partner who is 24/7 available, download SpeakX, click this link, and begin your confidence journey now.

summary: The presenter addresses the common challenge of lacking an English speaking partner and introduces SpeakX, an AI-powered learning app. She highlights features like personalized AI conversations, gamified lessons, and industry recognition. The ad concludes with a call to action to download the app and start a 7-day trial for ₹29.
